ddls:
CREATE TABLE "number_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number format configuration */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places */,
  "decimal_separator" TEXT /* Character used as the decimal separator */,
  "thousands_separator" TEXT /* Character used as the thousands separator */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Currency symbol or other prefix to be displayed before the number */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix such as percentage symbol to be displayed after the number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language used in the market */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time zone of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en-US) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone */,
  "utc_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset of the time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_formats" (
  "market_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping of market to number format */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the number format configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_formats_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_formats_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES number_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "preferred_language" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred language */,
  "preferred_time_zone" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_language FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_time_zone FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_time_zone") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the number format configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES number_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product price */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "amount" REAL /* The actual price amount */,
  "formatted_price" TEXT /* The formatted price based on market's number format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* The currency to exchange from */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* The currency to exchange to */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* The exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product involved in the transaction */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* The actual amount of the transaction */,
  "formatted_price" TEXT /* The formatted price based on market's number format */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the number format configuration */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the number format configuration */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_history_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES number_formats ("format_id")
)
